issue: Difficulty: ❌ MEDIUM - Requires at least HARD for python

agent_report.changes_summary: Hardened repair-express-trivia-worker for the python HARD gate by adding H-2026-20 (frozen deferred snapshot sync on amend): a new INC-46 amend retargets the snapshotted -6 from alice to bob before INC-45 rescind, forcing agents to update frozen snapshots not just the live incident map. Updated scoring_standard.md, rulings.json, instruction.md, helpers.py, solution/replay.py, test assertions, added test_amend_syncs_frozen_deferred_snapshot, fixed partial INC-11 tests to exclude INC-45/INC-46, bumped Dockerfile to platform-revision 2026-06-30-r23, and updated submission explanations and rubric.
